screen.notes: Multi-resume carousel; ATS parser; tailor agent approval-gated.

claim_rows.claim: AETHER_ASYNC_GENERATION is left permanently true in production (async generation is the default path)
claim_rows.method: Trigger a tailor/cover-letter/pipeline run on prod UI; expect HTTP 202 {job_id,status:enqueued}, not a synchronous 200

claim_rows.claim: Quota exhaustion never silently falls through to a different billing credential -- an explicit HTTP 429 is raised instead
claim_rows.method: Exhaust or simulate quota exhaustion on a test account and confirm 429 is returned, not a silent billing-credential switch

claim_rows.claim: A live sk-ant-oat01- token round-tripped through a genuine Anthropic API call (HTTP 200), and a live tailor run recorded billingAudit.authMode=oauth_token
claim_rows.method: Re-run the test-connection action for the configured oat01 credential and a tailor run; inspect billingAudit.authMode field on the resulting AgentRun

claim_rows.claim: POST /api/agents/{tailor,cover-letters}/run and the composite pipeline endpoint return HTTP 202 {"job_id","status":"enqueued"} (async mode); caller polls GET /api/agents/jobs/{job_id} for terminal state
claim_rows.method: Trigger a tailor/cover-letter/pipeline run via prod UI; confirm 202 + job_id in response; poll the jobs endpoint to a terminal state

claim_rows.claim: A 20-run production soak of async tailor/cover-letter generation showed 0 HTTP 503s, 0 fixture-fallback matches, 20/20 completed; a forced-failure run proved atomic quota refund
claim_rows.method: Re-run a smaller soak (e.g. 5-10 generations) on prod and confirm 0 HTTP 503s / 0 fixture-fingerprint matches (full 20-run reproduction may be impractical -- partial soak is acceptable evidence)

claim_rows.claim: All 27 core Phase-7 gates were VERIFIED-CLOSED including: 0 console errors across 20 routes (GATE-16), 0 same-origin 5xx (GATE-17), backend 676 pytest passed (GATE-19), frontend 297 vitest passed (GATE-20), Playwright E2E green (GATE-21)
claim_rows.method: Playwright console/network sweep across the 20 documented routes on prod; re-run backend pytest / frontend vitest suites (suite-run for counts); manual click-through spot-check for E2E flows

claim_rows.claim: Fixture fingerprints are absent from live generation output (0/60 sampled) (GATE-14)
claim_rows.method: Sample N live generations and check output text for known fixture-fingerprint strings

claim_rows.claim: A silent fixture-fallback that served canned test fixtures as real LLM output on timeout (AUTH-002) was removed
claim_rows.method: Attempt to force/observe a slow or failing LLM call and confirm an honest 503 (or async equivalent) is returned rather than a fixture; check output for known fixture-fingerprint text

claim_rows.claim: Tailoring is content-only: strict ATS-score lift 32.97 > 30.81 baseline, with zero fabrication (GATE-09)
claim_rows.method: Run tailor against a resume+job, compare before/after ATS score, inspect content for fabricated claims not traceable to source evidence

claim_rows.claim: ATS score is shown with a MetricTooltip, methodology text, and before/after values (GATE-10)
claim_rows.method: UI inspection: hover/click the MetricTooltip on the ATS score, confirm methodology text and before/after numbers render

claim_rows.claim: E2E: 17 core screens verified live + cover-503 fixed + mobile-overflow fixed; /pipeline/run is edge-limited (524 @125s) as a documented async residual (BACKLOG-P6-02) as of Phase-6 (GATE-26)
claim_rows.method: Trigger POST /agents/pipeline/run on prod; per later Phase-7 claims (async now permanently on) this residual should be RESOLVED -- confirm no 524 timeout and instead a 202 async response

claim_rows.claim: The subscription paywall (AETHER_REQUIRE_PAID_SUBSCRIPTION=true) is ACTIVE in production -- an unpaid agent run attempt returns HTTP 402 subscription_required
claim_rows.method: Attempt an agent run as an unpaid/free-tier user on prod, confirm 402 with subscription_required error code

claim_rows.claim: 4 live tailoring runs were content-only + non-regression on ATS + zero fabrication; the entailment guard actively rejects unsupported proposed candidate bullets rather than passing them through
claim_rows.method: Run tailor multiple times against different JDs, inspect diffs for fabricated/unsupported content, confirm ATS score does not regress

claim_rows.claim: Conversion UI: estimatedConversionLift + methodology text + a working MetricTooltip (data-testid trigger/popover, role=tooltip, hover-revealed, illustrative-estimate disclaimer) render in the real DOM; before/after ATS is shown; 0 console errors (GATE-10)
claim_rows.method: Playwright: inspect DOM for the data-testid tooltip trigger/popover with role=tooltip attribute; hover to reveal; check disclaimer text; capture console errors

claim_rows.claim: A Playwright sweep of 14 dashboard routes + /pricing + /admin as a paid admin showed 0 console errors / 0 failed requests / 0 page errors (GATE-03)
claim_rows.method: Playwright sweep of the listed routes on prod, capture console + network errors

claim_rows.claim: One genuine transient HTTP 503 occurred during a UI-driven tailor run ("LLM call exceeded hard budget of 38.7s"); an immediate retry succeeded
claim_rows.method: One-off historical observation, not deterministically reproducible; best-effort soak reproduction only -- likely to end UNVERIFIABLE-FROM-UI unless a fresh transient 503 is independently observed

claim_rows.claim: The résumé asset assets/resume/Vik_Resume_Final.pdf remains byte-for-byte unchanged (md5 16b856c0f3f4ec0d801fdde6d084452c), used as an unmodified format-conformance reference
claim_rows.method: Compute md5 of assets/resume/Vik_Resume_Final.pdf in the repo, compare to the claimed hash (repo file check, not a live-UI check)

claim_rows.claim: Every job card on job-discovery has a "Tailor Resume ->" deep link to /dashboard/resume?job=<id>
claim_rows.method: UI inspection: click the Tailor link on a job card, confirm navigation to Resume Studio with the job pre-selected

claim_rows.claim: Resume Studio has a Download button for resumes
claim_rows.method: Click Download on a resume in the UI, confirm the file downloads (or, if still unimplemented, that it degrades gracefully rather than erroring silently)

claim_rows.claim: Tailored resume ATS score is >= baseline (non-negative lift) -- a previously catastrophic negative-lift regression was reversed
claim_rows.method: Run tailor, compare before/after ATS scores, confirm tailored >= baseline

claim_rows.claim: An entailment-verification pass reverts a tailored bullet with an unsupported claim rather than shipping it; a top-8 batch cap + scaled entailment budget resolves a "verifier starves the shared latency budget" defect
claim_rows.method: Run tailor against a JD requiring unsupported claims to fill gaps, confirm the guard reverts them rather than fabricating

claim_rows.claim: A fresh 10-attempt live production QA round showed 8/10 honest completions (2 of which delivered a genuine ATS-score lift, 30.81->32.97) with zero fabrication survivors across all 8 completions; the remaining ~20% returned an honest HTTP 503 (never a fixture) due to the synchronous ~100s HTTP edge
claim_rows.method: Run N tailor attempts on prod; per later Phase-7 claims (async now permanently enabled, claim-3/14/17) the ~20% honest-503 rate should now be RESOLVED to ~0% -- test whether this superseded residual still applies

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named resume-studio or resume-studio_auth/resume-studio_unauth or baseline/resume-studio depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
